name: search
description: Semantic search over the project index. Embeds the query and ranks indexed entries by cosine similarity. Defaults to searching file summaries; can also search indexed conversations or commits, or all types combined. Returns top-K results as `score<TAB>identifier` lines (and for type=all, identifier is prefixed with the entry type). Requires the project to have been indexed — run `scratch index` first if the results come back empty.

query.description: Natural-language query (e.g. 'how does retry logic work', 'database schema', 'auth refactor').

type.description: Which entry type to search. 'file' = indexed source files (default). 'conversation' = past chat transcripts. 'commit' = git commit messages. 'all' = mixed; identifier is prefixed with the type for disambiguation.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10.
